label: IHS Holding · Prior Featured Work
title: Black Atlantic Crossings: The Lives and Anti-Racist Tactics of Booker T. Washington and Manuel R. Querino
shortTitle: Black Atlantic Crossings: The Lives and Anti-Racist Tactics of Booker T. Washington and Manuel R. Querino
abstract: Black Atlantic Crossings examines the lives and anti-racist tactics of Booker T. Washington and Manuel R. Querino, placing the two figures in a transatlantic Black Atlantic frame rather than treating them only within U.S. and Brazilian national histories. The book considers their strategies for combating racism through education, politics, and cultural production, and argues for their continuing importance in histories of post-slavery racial thought and activism.
